creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gerald      2012-05-27 12:00:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
    emulators/wine-gecko-devel Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  Branch the emulators/wine-gecko port like we have been branching a new
  emulators/wine-devel port off emulators/wine.  This new port, emulators/
  wine-gecko-devel, now goes with wine-devel whereas wine-gecko continues
  to support the regular wine port.
  
  PR:             166730
  Submitted by:   David Naylor <naylor.b.david@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.331     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile
  1.6       +5 -6      ports/emulators/wine-gecko-devel/Makefile
  1.5       +2 -2      ports/emulators/wine-gecko-devel/distinfo
